/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_mqtt.dir/src/signal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt.dir/src/fft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt.dir/src/sampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt.dir/src/mqtt_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt.dir/tests/test_mqtt.cpp.o -o test_mqtt   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -lm libkissfft.a -lmosquitto
